typography.weights: Headings: 300/400 (light/regular) for elegance, Body: 300/400, Buttons: 500, Script: 400

visual_enhancers.texture: Apply a global noise texture overlay to simulate cream textured paper. Use a fixed div with pointer-events-none, mix-blend-multiply, opacity-20, and a base64 SVG noise pattern.
visual_enhancers.edges: For the 'torn-paper' look on notes or edges, use a CSS mask-image with an SVG filter (feTurbulence) or a jagged clip-path.
visual_enhancers.polaroid: bg-white p-3 pb-12 shadow-xl border border-black/5. Add subtle rotations (e.g., rotate-[-3deg] or rotate-[4deg]) and overlap them slightly in the hero section.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For sticky headers: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F8F6F0]/80 border-b border-[#2C2A29]/10.
visual_enhancers.florals: Frame corners using delicate gold or charcoal SVG floral line-art (use lucide-react 'Leaf', 'Flower' or custom SVG paths) wrapped in absolute positioned divs.

grids_and_layouts.spacing_system: Generous Spacing: p-8, p-12, p-24, p-32. Sections should have massive vertical breathing room (py-24 or py-32).
grids_and_layouts.bento_grid: For 'OUR SERVICES', use an asymmetrical bento grid. Make some items span 2 columns and others 1. Use gap-8.
grids_and_layouts.packages_grid: 4-column grid for pricing (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-6. Highlight standard/premium with blush pink backgrounds.

motion.scrolling: MANDATORY: Implement Lenis smooth scrolling wrapper for momentum scrolling.
motion.hero_reveal: Kinetic Hero: Split text lines wrapped in overflow-hidden containers. Use Framer Motion or GSAP to animate y: '100%' to '0%' with stagger. Duration 1.2s, ease: 'power4.out'.
motion.parallax: Use Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform for subtle Y-axis parallax on the polaroid images as the user scrolls down.
motion.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for a slow, editorial ribbon. Text should be large outline text (text-8xl, text-transparent, stroke-text) in charcoal.
motion.scroll_reveals: Use Framer Motion 'whileInView' with viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }} to gently fade-up and drift sections into place.

components.Hero: Full-bleed cream background with noise. Center-top H1 'EVENT DIARY' (massive serif tracking-tighter). Script tagline 'We Plan. You Enjoy' positioned organically over the H1. Subtitle 'SOCIAL MEDIA MARKETING / For Every Celebration' with gold star icons. Render 3 polaroid images overlapping asynchronously. Add a torn-paper div with handwriting 'capturing moments, creating memories'. Two CTA buttons.
components.Header: Sticky, glassmorphic minimal nav. Links: Services, Packages, Events Covered, Connect. Button: BOOK NOW (pill shape, gold/charcoal).
components.Services: 5 blocks using line icons (lucide-react). Services: Content Creation, iPhone Photography, Social Media Management, Branding & Promotion, Influencer & Collabs.
components.Packages: 4 columns. EXACT TEXT REQUIRED: BASIC ₹4,999 / STANDARD ₹9,999 / PREMIUM ₹19,999 / CUSTOM. Give 'Premium' a blush pink highlight, gold accents on prices. Each has a CTA opening the contact modal.
components.Events_Covered: 2 columns. List event types (weddings, engagements, mehndi/haldi, birthdays, corporate, baby showers, product launches, festivals) with heart icons. Script tagline '...and every moment worth celebrating!'
components.Perks: 3 columns: iPhone Shots, Creative & Trendy, On Time Delivery. Minimalist icons.
components.Footer: Script text 'Let's make your moments unforgettable!'. Signature 'EVENT DIARY'. Massive final CTA 'READY TO MAKE YOUR EVENT UNFORGETTABLE?'. Frame bottom edges with SVG florals.
components.Contact_Modal: A Shadcn Dialog triggered by all CTAs. EXACT CONTACT INFO REQUIRED: email 'daeventdiary@gmail.com', Instagram '@the_eventdiary', call '9477657156'. Keep modal styling consistent with paper texture.

hero_polaroid_1.description: Luxury Event decor - Use inside polaroid component

hero_polaroid_2.description: Haldi Ceremony - Use inside polaroid component

hero_polaroid_3.description: Elegant Table Setup - Use inside polaroid component

general_event.description: Banquet Celebration - Use in services or events section

instructions_to_main_agent: Install necessary packages: framer-motion, @studio-freight/react-lenis, react-fast-marquee, lucide-react.
Embed Google Fonts directly in index.css (Cormorant Garamond, Montserrat, Great Vibes).
Create a reusable <Polaroid /> component taking an image URL, rotation class, and optional script text.
Implement a global noise texture using a fixed div overlay in the root layout.
Build the contact modal using standard Shadcn Dialog but heavily style it to match the warm cream/paper aesthetic. Do NOT use default Vercel/Stripe styling.
Ensure exact pricing text and exact contact emails/numbers are present and functional.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
